title: Automation Mode Config (v1)
description: Controls Claude Code's automation behavior for this user (or this project, if placed at <project>/.claude/automation-mode.json). The gate hook reads this config to decide whether to block deploy-class commands and require explicit confirmation. Resolution order: project-local <project>/.claude/automation-mode.json -> user-global ~/.claude/local/automation-mode.json -> hardcoded default of review-before-deploy. Lives at ~/.claude/local/automation-mode.json by default; example at adapters/claude-code/examples/automation-mode.example.json. Schema version 1.

mode.description: Automation mode. 'review-before-deploy' (default) blocks deploy-class commands until the user confirms in chat. 'full-auto' allows deploy-class commands without intermediate confirmation. The slash command /automation-mode flips this value; the first-run SessionStart prompt seeds it.

deploy_matchers.description: Command-prefix patterns the gate hook checks against in 'review-before-deploy' mode. When the matched prefix is present in a Bash invocation, the hook blocks until confirmation. Defaults are listed in adapters/claude-code/examples/automation-mode.example.json. Override only to add project-specific deploy commands; do not narrow defaults.
